nasb.text: He said to me, “Do you see this, son of man? Yet you will see still greater abominations than these.”

esv.text: Then he said to me, “Have you seen this, O son of man? You will see still greater abominations than these.”

cnv.text: 他對我說：“人子啊，你看見了嗎？你還要看見比這些更可憎的事。”

ccb.text: 祂对我说：“人子啊，你看见了吗？你会看到更可憎的事。”
